Nowadays the increase of data variety considered a very dispute problem for analysis. So innovative methods are mandatory for analytics especially in big data where the data in characteristic very complex and unstructured. The analytics is the process of analysis to predict concealed patterns and associations among data. The main objective of this survey paper is to provide an exhaustive view of different predictive analytics applications and approaches.
